parameters.target_label: Adults aged 40-75 with first observed type 2 diabetes diagnosis

sql:
-- OMOP incidence analysis SQL generated by RWE-Gen
-- This SQL is populated only. It is not executed by this module.
WITH
target AS (
    SELECT
        index_event.person_id,
        index_event.index_date,
        person.gender_concept_id,
        person.year_of_birth,
        person.month_of_birth,
        person.day_of_birth
    FROM (
        SELECT
            cohort_event.person_id,
            MIN(cohort_event.condition_start_date) AS index_date
        FROM condition_occurrence cohort_event
        WHERE cohort_event.condition_concept_id IN (201826)
        GROUP BY cohort_event.person_id
    ) index_event
    JOIN person ON person.person_id = index_event.person_id
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(index_event.index_date, MAKE_DATE(person.year_of_birth, COALESCE(person.month_of_birth, 1), COALESCE(person.day_of_birth, 1)))) >= 40 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(index_event.index_date, MAKE_DATE(person.year_of_birth, COALESCE(person.month_of_birth, 1), COALESCE(person.day_of_birth, 1)))) <= 75 AND person.gender_concept_id IN (8507, 8532) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM observation_period op WHERE op.person_id = index_event.person_id AND op.observation_period_start_date <= index_event.index_date - INTERVAL '365 day' AND op.observation_period_end_date >= index_event.index_date) AND NOT ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM condition_occurrence evt WHERE evt.person_id = index_event.person_id AND evt.condition_concept_id IN (201826) AND evt.condition_start_date >= index_event.index_date + INTERVAL '365 day' AND evt.condition_start_date <= index_event.index_date + INTERVAL '1 day') >= 1) AND NOT ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM condition_occurrence evt WHERE evt.person_id = index_event.person_id AND evt.condition_concept_id IN (46271022) AND evt.condition_start_date >= index_event.index_date + INTERVAL '365 day' AND evt.condition_start_date <= index_event.index_date + INTERVAL '0 day') >= 1)
),
target_outcomes AS (
    SELECT
        c.person_id,
        MIN(o.condition_start_date) AS outcome_date
    FROM target c
    JOIN condition_occurrence o
      ON o.person_id = c.person_id
     AND o.condition_concept_id IN (46271022)
     AND o.condition_start_date >= c.index_date + INTERVAL '1 day'
     AND o.condition_start_date <= ((SELECT MAX(op.observation_period_end_date) FROM observation_period op WHERE op.person_id = c.person_id)) + INTERVAL '0 day'
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM condition_occurrence prev_outcome WHERE prev_outcome.person_id = c.person_id AND prev_outcome.condition_concept_id IN (46271022) AND prev_outcome.condition_start_date < c.index_date AND prev_outcome.condition_start_date >= c.index_date - INTERVAL '365 day')
    GROUP BY c.person_id
),
target_summary AS (
    SELECT
        'Adults aged 40-75 with first observed type 2 diabetes diagnosis' AS population_label,
        COUNT(*) AS cohort_size,
        COUNT(o.person_id) AS event_count,
        SUM(
            GREATEST(
                EXTRACT(DAY FROM (
                    COALESCE(o.outcome_date, CURRENT_DATE) - c.index_date
                )),
                0
            )
        ) AS person_time_days,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(GREATEST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (COALESCE(o.outcome_date, CURRENT_DATE) - c.index_date)), 0)) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE COUNT(o.person_id)::numeric /
                 NULLIF(SUM(GREATEST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (COALESCE(o.outcome_date, CURRENT_DATE) - c.index_date)), 0)), 0)
        END AS incidence_per_person_day
    FROM target c
    LEFT JOIN target_outcomes o ON o.person_id = c.person_id
)
SELECT * FROM target_summary;
